name: photo-edit-fusion
description: All-in-one photo editor (PWA + Electron) with overlay, blend, cut, font extraction and font cloning.

scripts.build: pnpm -r --filter "./packages/**" run build && pnpm -r --filter "./apps/**" run build
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm scan-secrets && pnpm scan-placeholders && pnpm test
scripts.clean: pnpm -r exec rm -rf dist node_modules .turbo && rm -rf node_modules
